data.title: Matrixport announces the launch of a stablecoin-to-US stock trading product, with account opening open today.
data.description: On January 29th, Matrixport announced the launch of a new stablecoin (USDT/USDC) direct investment service in US stocks. Starting today, users can download the app through official channels and complete KYC (Know Your Customer) in advance. Trading will officially open on February 3rd. This service connects directly to established licensed US brokerages, allowing users to hold US stock assets and enjoy shareholder rights. It also supports 24/7 instant deposits and withdrawals of stablecoins, providing users with a flexible and efficient global asset allocation experience. This move marks the official launch of Matrixport's 2026 strategic blueprint and is a prelude to a comprehensive brand refresh. The company also revealed that a brand strategy upgrade will be launched soon, leading the crypto finance industry into an era of multi-asset allocation with a brand-new image.

data.title: Securitize Appoints Giang Bui as VP and Head of Issuer Growth
data.description: Securitize has announced the appointment of Giang Bui, the former head of Nasdaq's equities and ETF division, as Vice President and Head of Issuer Growth. According to NS3.AI, Bui's role will involve expanding issuer partnerships and launching regulatory-compliant tokenized products. The company is collaborating with major firms such as Apollo and BlackRock and is working towards an initial public offering.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 88,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.53% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 29, 2026, 11:08 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 88,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 88,012.25 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.53% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Companies Announce Layoffs Amid Recession Concerns
data.description: Major U.S. companies, including Amazon, Pinterest, and UPS, have announced significant layoffs, heightening fears of a potential recession. According to NS3.AI, the U.S. labor market is exhibiting signs of weakness, characterized by extended job searches and a declining likelihood of re-employment, which are exacerbating economic concerns. These challenges may exert pressure on risk assets, such as cryptocurrencies, in the short term. However, expectations of monetary easing could offer longer-term support.

data.title: AI Web3 Wallet Developer Holdstation Suffers $100,000 Loss in Security Breach
data.description: AI Web3 wallet developer Holdstation has experienced a security breach resulting in a loss of approximately $100,000. According to PANews, the attack was detected by BlockSec, revealing that the attacker moved assets across various chains, including World Chain, BSC, Berachain, and zkSync. The total value of the assets transferred was around $66,000, comprising WLD, USD1, BNB, and BERA. These assets were eventually consolidated into 22.41 ETH on the Ethereum network and then bridged to the Bitcoin network, converting to 0.755 BTC. The Holdstation team has issued an on-chain message and is attempting to negotiate with the attacker.

data.title: Solayer Integrates Mainnet Data with Databricks for Enhanced Transparency
data.description: Solayer has announced the official integration of its mainnet data with the data analytics platform Databricks. According to ChainCatcher, this move aims to provide users with a fully transparent data access experience, from blockchain to dashboard. Through this integration, users can access real-time insights and daily data updates from Solayer, as well as explore in-depth information, including historical archive data from InfiniSVM.

data.title: Metaplanet approves $137M overseas raise to buy Bitcoin and repay debt
data.description:
Metaplanet said proceeds will be used for Bitcoin purchases, its Bitcoin income business, and partial debt repayment as it executes its capital strategy.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/metaplanet-137m-overseas-raise-bitcoin-debt?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Metaplanet Doubles Down on Bitcoin With New Funding Plan
data.description:
The move reinforces the company’s transformation into a Bitcoin-focused treasury vehicle rather than a traditional operating business.
source: https://coindoo.com/metaplanet-doubles-down-on-bitcoin-with-new-funding-plan/

data.title: Ripple’s billion dollar masterstroke forces 13,000 banks to rethink corporate cash while raising tough questions for XRP
data.description:
Ripple has pushed deeper into corporate finance with a new treasury platform that aims to let finance teams manage cash and digital assets in one system. The product, called Ripple Treasury, is built on treasury management software Ripple acquired in October 2025 when it bought GTreasury in a $1 billion deal.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ripple-treasury-platform-gtreasury-rlusd-xrp-institutional-payments/

data.title: Sol Meme's BP token surged over 760% intraday, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $17.9 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the price of Meme coin (BP) on the Solana chain surged by over 760% intraday, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $17.9 million before settling back to approximately $17 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: West Main Self Storage Acquires Strategy Preferred Shares for $200,000
data.description: West Main Self Storage has purchased 2,014 shares of Strategy perpetual preferred stock (STRC) for $200,000. According to Odaily, the acquisition was financed through a fixed-rate loan with an interest rate of 6%. The loan is unsecured, non-recourse, and interest-only.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidations on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $3,093, the cumulative liquidation intensity for short positions on mainstream centralized exchanges will reach $1.291 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,821, the cumulative liquidation intensity for long positions will amount to $586 million.

data.title: West Main Self Storage purchased 2014 shares of Strategy perpetual preferred stock for $200,000.
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries.NET reported on the X platform that West Main Self Storage purchased 2,014 shares of Strategy Perpetual Preferred Stock (STRC) for $200,000. The transaction was financed through an unsecured, non-recourse, interest-only loan with a fixed interest rate of 6%.

data.title: Following 8 FOMC meetings in 2025, Bitcoin experienced 7 price drops, with an average decline of 14%.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ali, in 7 out of 8 FOMC meetings in 2025, BTC experienced a significant pullback after each meeting, with an average drop of 14%. Only one meeting saw a brief upward reaction afterward.

data.title: Copper Price Surge Boosts Trader's Profits to $2.2 Million
data.description:
A prominent trader has seen their account profits increase to $2.2 million due to rising copper prices. According to ChainCatcher, the trader's total holdings have reached $49.2 million, with significant gains from copper futures contracts. The account's profits grew by approximately $1.1 million compared to the previous day.

Key positions include a $21.12 million stake in the Nasdaq 100 index, with an average price of $25,443.47 and a liquidation price of $23,421, resulting in a profit of around $530,000 (20%). The copper futures mapping contract holds a position of approximately $18.97 million, with an average price of $5.91 and a liquidation price of $5.5, yielding a profit of about $1.22 million (44%).

Other holdings include a $2.87 million position in Palantir Technologies, with an average price of $165.47 and a liquidation price of $152, resulting in a loss of approximately $2.36 million (-138%). Additionally, there is a $2.66 million position in Micron Technology, with an average price of $343 and a liquidation price of $325, generating a profit of around $600,000 (74%).

The trader focuses on U.S. stocks and on-chain precious metals, having previously been the largest long position holder in on-chain gold. They have since closed their gold positions and shifted their strategy to concentrate on the Nasdaq index and copper prices, with nearly $40 million invested in these areas.

data.title: Whale Closes $4.5 Million BTC Short Position with Profit
data.description:
A whale recently closed a $4.5 million short position on Bitcoin, securing a profit of $84,900. According to ChainCatcher, the account currently shows an unrealized loss of $147,000.

The address is characterized by high-frequency trading behavior, often employing a 10x leverage strategy. This approach is flexible but indicates a high-risk preference.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Selling Pressure Amid High Cost Basis
data.description: More than half of the invested Bitcoin supply has a cost basis exceeding $88,000, which is above the current market prices. According to NS3.AI, this scenario increases the risk of selling pressure if Bitcoin's key support levels are breached. The heightened vulnerability could impact Bitcoin's price stability in the near term.

data.title: Kazakhstan is cracking down on capital flight through crypto
data.description:
The government of Kazakhstan is stepping up efforts to curb illegal cryptocurrency transactions, including capital flight via digital assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kazakhstan-cracking-capital-flight-crypto/
